message:
feat(wezterm): spawn_with_cx + spawn_targeted_with_cx (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Continue the pane-lifecycle Cx-first migration started in tick 40
(`run_cli_with_cx` helper) and continued in tick 41 (kill/zoom).

Additions (strictly additive, asupersync-runtime-gated):

  * `WeztermClient::spawn_with_cx(cx, cwd, domain_name)` — Cx-first
    entry point for `spawn`. Pure delegate to
    `spawn_targeted_with_cx(cx, cwd, domain_name,
    SpawnTarget::default())`. Mirrors the legacy `spawn` which
    delegates to `spawn_targeted`.

  * `WeztermClient::spawn_targeted_with_cx(cx, cwd, domain_name, target)`
    — Cx-first entry point for `spawn_targeted`. Preserves the argv
    construction bit-for-bit: same `--new-window` / `--window-id <id>`
    branch logic, same `--domain-name=<domain>` / `--cwd=<dir>`
    optional appends. Routes through `run_cli_with_cx` (not
    `run_cli_with_pane_check_with_cx` — spawn creates a pane, no
    pre-existing pane_id to check against).

The legacy `spawn` and `spawn_targeted` remain untouched; all
non-migrated callers continue to route through the legacy timeout()
path.

Regression guards — two new short-circuit tests:

  * `spawn_with_cx_short_circuits_on_missing_socket` — exercises the
    `spawn_with_cx -> spawn_targeted_with_cx` delegation. If a future
    refactor broke the delegate (e.g. started doing its own argv
    construction), a different error variant would surface.

  * `spawn_targeted_with_cx_short_circuits_on_missing_socket` —
    exercises BOTH `SpawnTarget` branches:
      - `new_window: true` (adds `--new-window`)
      - `window_id: Some(7)` with `new_window: false`
        (adds `--window-id 7`)
    Separate assertions each. Catches regressions in the conditional
    argv construction on the Cx path (argv build reuses the same
    scoped `String` variables as the legacy path).

Pane-lifecycle Cx-first surface coverage on `WeztermClient` after
tick 42:
  * `activate_pane_with_cx` (tick 40)
  * `kill_pane_with_cx` (tick 41)
  * `zoom_pane_with_cx` (tick 41)
  * `spawn_with_cx` (tick 42, new)
  * `spawn_targeted_with_cx` (tick 42, new)

Remaining on this trail: `split_pane_with_cx` (uses
`run_cli_with_pane_check_with_cx` since it splits from an existing
pane_id).

Verification (local fork bypass, CC=llvm clang,
CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target):
  * wezterm:: — 165 passed / 0 failed (tick 41: 163 -> tick 42: 165,
    +2 new tests)
  * cargo fmt -p frankenterm-core -- --check — clean

Bead: ft-xbnl0.2.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
